title: Aurora, 31744, Mini Flopsies Llama, 8In Cuddly Llama Soft Toy, White
features: From Aurora’s highly popular Mini Flopsies Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials.
Realistic animal with soft and cuddly bean bag bodies.
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible animal.
description: From the manufacturer Mini Flopsies Our 8" Mini Flopsie Llama is lovingly crafted and meticulously designed to provide its recipient with years of hugs and cuddles. With a bean filled floppy body, this Mini Flopsie is a great cuddle buddy and even better friend. Top quality materials are used to ensure durability and softness. Suitable from birth
